Transport Tycoon Empire
BEST TRANSPORT TYCOON & CITY BUILDING SIMULATOR!
Collect vehicles, deliver cargo, finish contracts and build your city to become ultimate transport tycoon! On land, sea and in the air, your transport empire will have no bounds.
Game Details
Get it on
Garage Mania
ULTIMATE PUZZLE ADVENTURE & CAR RESTORATION COMBINED!
Dive into an exhilarating world where car love meets strategic puzzle matching challenges. In this captivating match journey, transform vehicles from basic to breathtaking. Take classic vehicles and customize them to your taste.
Game Details
Get it on
Sniper Agent
Become the Ultimate Sniper
Fight crime and gangsters all around the world in breathtaking city environments from New York to Tokyo. Take up your sniper rifle and become the one they fear. Large selection of realistic sniper rifles, realistic graphics and tons of gun shooting fun for months!
Game Details
Get it on
The Walking Zombie 2
ZOMBIE FIRST PERSON SHOOTER AND RPG SURVIVAL!
The world after the zombie apocalypse is a grim place. You were born into it so you will have to struggle to survive and fight against many kinds of zombies, bandits and dangerous boss monsters.
Game Details
Get it on
Zombero
TOP-DOWN ARCHERO HERO SHOOTER!
Fight through masses of zombies and other monsters in this roguelike shooter. When zombie apocalypse rages once again and this could be your last day on Earth, only a man of strong faith and even stronger weapons can find a solution.
Game Details
Get it on
Polygon Fantasy: Action RPG
POLYGON FANTASY IS AN OLD-SCHOOL RPG WITH MODERN NICE-TO-HAVES
Enjoy epic diablo-like action RPG on your mobile device. Become powerful witch, elegant rogue, dependable warrior or one of other exciting classes and fight evil that comes from Twisted Realm.
Game Details
Get it on
World War Polygon
EPIC SINGLE-PLAYER FIRST PERSON SHOOTER
World War Polygon is a first-person shooter from WW2. When the world falls into the hell called war, it needs heroes who will stand against evil. World War Polygon allows you to be such a hero!
Game Details
Get it on
Summoners Raid
BEST TEAM BASED RPG & HERO SUMMONER
Summon legendary heroes, asemble powerful teams, defeat epic bosses and become the ultimate raid champion! Fight in fairy forest, snowy mountains or hot burning plains and claim your victory!
Game Details
Get it on
Makeover Mania
FROM RUINS TO A DREAM HOME – CAN YOU MAKE IT HAPPEN?
Emily and her daughter Sophie have lost everything. Now, they have a single chance to rebuild their lives—starting with a house that's falling apart. Pick up your tools and turn your life around!

about.text:
About us | Alda Games
Our Story
We are a bunch of players, programmers and designers who love creating amazing games, since 2013! We are dedicated to bring great experience for our players, no matter if it is on mobile, PC or consoles!
Learn more
Based in Brno, Czech Republic
Creating amazing and popular games
Hard working but chill
Always improving - ourselves & our games
Mobile game hits
We specialize in mobile games for Android and iOS. With strong history of PC and console game development, our skill and production qualities among best on mobile platforms. We don’t shy away from challenges and complex gameplay and high-quality graphics.
Browse games
History of Alda Games
Our small indie gamedev company was founded in 2013 in Brno, Czech republic. We grew with our games, both mobile nad PC, and after global hits like Defend Your Life, Walking Zombie 2 or Killing Room we decided to focus mostly on mobile games for Android and iOS. And these are the platforms where our current hits shine. We are part of the creative and hard-working gamedev culture in Brno and we are proud that our games are played by tens of millions of gamers around the world.
Join Alda Games
We are also searching for passionate and skilled programmers, artists, designers and marketing specialists who will fit into our young and dedicated team and help us create even better games.
We are working hard to meet expectations of our players but we also love our company parties, sports and frequent breaks filled with table football matches.
Career
